goal: Wire GameManager phase state machine and Listener permanent Frenzy for Phase 3.
summary: Phase 3 complete. GameManager phase state machine is wired with Phase1 → Phase2 → Phase3 → Victory flow and emits Phase3Started when entering Phase 3. ListenerAI subscribes to Phase3Started, sets its permanent-frenzy flag, and handles the new Phase3PermanentFrenzy target mode at top priority: alive Token holder → spawned RadioItem → idle log. Standard 12-second Scream Frenzy logic remains untouched.
stepSummaries:
1. Extend `GameManager.cs` with a phase state machine: Phase1 → Phase2 (on AllWordsRegistered), Phase2 → Phase3 (on SequenceComplete), Phase3 → Victory (on BroadcastComplete), plus fail states. Spawn RadioItem at appropriate marker when Phase 3 begins. [verified]
  2. Extend `ListenerAI.cs` to enter permanent Frenzy when GameManager enters Phase 3. Target broadcaster/Token holder; if no Token, target radio location. Hook into existing Frenzy state without destroying standard 12s Frenzy logic. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps are verified. Step 1 used the defined grep proxy, which confirms the required phase symbols exist in GameManager.cs. Step 2 used the defined grep proxy and an independent Builder subagent re-verified the implementation against GAME_DESIGN.md semantics, confirming no gaps and correct target priority/interruption immunity. Structural syntax checks passed; full dotnet build could not run in this WSL environment.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verify passed; Step 2 verify passed; Builder subagent report confirmed implementation correctness without changes.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to wire GameManager phase state machine and Listener permanent Frenzy for Phase 3. GameManager.cs now has CurrentPhase/Phase2/Phase3/Phase3Started and emits Phase3Started on sequence completion. ListenerAI.cs subscribes to that signal, enters permanent Frenzy, and targets Token holder/radio with top priority while blocking interruption.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs: CurrentPhase, Phase3Started, phase transitions; Scripts/Enemy/ListenerAI.cs: SubscribePhase3Signals, OnPhase3Started, Phase3PermanentFrenzy case, ResolveFallbackTargetPriority guard, HearNoise guard.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in Phase 3. Both steps are terminal and verified; no known gaps remain for this phase.
